## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python3 scripts/validate_skills.py`.
- [ ] I did not include real credentials, keys, service account JSON, package names, bundle IDs, team IDs, issuer IDs, webhook URLs, or private app metadata.
- [ ] Examples are anonymized and safe to copy only after replacing placeholders.
- [ ] Fixtures are anonymized and intentionally model validation scenarios.
- [ ] If I changed store policy guidance, I checked current official Apple or Google documentation and linked it in this PR.
- [ ] If I changed skill behavior, I updated references, fixtures, or validator coverage where appropriate.
